title: CobbleLegends
description: Brand new modpack for a new non p2w cobblemon server
body:
# 🏰 Cobblelegends Official Modpack

**The ultimate Cobblemon experience — optimized, enhanced, and ready to play.**

**IMPORTANT: Make sure to dedicate 4-6 Gb of RAM in settings to prevent any crashing**
---

## ⚡ Performance First

This modpack has been carefully curated with performance as a top priority. We've included essential optimization mods that dramatically reduce lag, improve chunk loading, and ensure smooth gameplay even on lower-end systems. Say goodbye to stuttering and frame drops — CobblemonLegends runs like a dream.

- Clumps
- Entity Culling
- Immediately Fast
- Sodium

---

## 🗺️ Built-In Minimap

Never get lost on your adventure! This modpack comes with a a minimap to optimise the cobblemon experience.

- Xaero's minimap
- Xaero's world map

---

## ✨ Quality-of-Life Enhancements

We've packed in a selection of quality-of-life mods that make your Cobblemon journey smoother and more enjoyable. From inventory management improvements to UI enhancements, every addition has been hand-picked to improve functionality without bloating your game.

- Ambient Environment - Makes the entire world feel so much better
- Better Advancements - improves the old minecraft advancements UI
- Better Third Person & Not enough animations - adds the coolest third person animations and ui
- InvMove - allowing you to move while you have GUI's and your inventory open

---

## 🎮 The CobblemonLegends Server Experience

This modpack is built specifically for the **CobblemonLegends** server, a fully non-p2w server with a mix of competitive battles and a relaxing friendly community:

- **NON-P2W** — nothing is sold in our store besides for cosmetic items! 0 advantages are given to paying players. Allowing us to keep the competitiveness of pokemon!
- **ALL MEGAS** — We have all the megas including Z-A accessible in our server!
- **🏆 Gym Leaders & Elite Four** — Challenge formidable trainers and prove your worth on the path to becoming Champion - Do you think you're strong enough to be one of these leaders?
- **🗼 Battle Tower** — Conquer our unique multi-stage tower to test your team's endurance and earn exclusive rewards
- **💰 Competitive Tournaments** — Battle in high-stakes competitions for incredible loot and real prize money
- **🎨 Custom Content** — Look forward to exciting updates including unique custom Pokémon reskins
- **👥 Active Community** — Join a friendly, welcoming community of trainers ready to battle, trade, and explore

---

## 📦 What's Included

- Latest version of Cobblemon
- Performance optimization mods
- Integrated minimap with full functionality
- Quality-of-life and UI improvements
- Pre-configured settings for optimal gameplay
- Seamless CobblemonLegends server integration

---

## 🔧 Compatibility

- Built for the latest Cobblemon release
- Minecraft version: 1.21.1
- Mod loader: *Fabric*

---

*Start your legendary Cobblemon journey today and claim your throne on CobblemonLegends!*
